title: Hartford Financial (HIG) Improves Offerings With Beam Benefits
text: Hartford Financial (HIG) collaborates with Beam Benefits to offer dental and vision plans to small employers' clients.

title: The 4 Best Dividend Contenders in August 2023
text: As schools start and summer nears its end, the stock market usually enters a down period. August and September have typically been volatile and often exhibit weak returns.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy for This Tough-as-Nails Market
text: Let's face it, it's a tough market out there. Investors aren't out of the woods yet despite the recovery and recent S&P 500 and Nasdaq rally this year.
